{{CargoOrgan
|name=Fighter Horns
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10953
|idx=146
|description=A pair of horns brimming with pure inner energy. From a legendary ram champion - the finest part of its body. Excellent for crafting magic tools...or making soup.
|skill=
|hp=1196
|def=81
|atk=126
|rush=91
|gene1=Against Daily Hitmen, {race} HP +200
|gene2=Per Hitman intercepted, {race} RUSH +1
Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|gene3=Against Daily Hitmen, Round 1 DMG +5%
|gene7=Against Daily Hitmen, Round 1 DMG +5% (Awakened)
|}}
